settings.title: Tell the shopper what the product is immediately
settings.copy: A strong pre-lander removes ambiguity fast instead of copying a blog article or a long-form advertorial pattern.

settings.title: Place proof near the action
settings.copy: Use concise benefit framing, one featured product, and a clear next click so the page still feels lightweight.

settings.title: Design for paid-social thumbs, not desktop habits
settings.copy: Spacing, CTAs, and media should all feel comfortable for one-handed scanning and quick decision-making.

settings.heading: Layer in creator-style proof before the PDP

settings.author: @typsh.it
settings.title: Use the pre-lander to reinforce the ad promise
settings.caption: This keeps the journey consistent between the creative, landing page, and final product detail page.
